stockMarket.summary: Global markets are experiencing a downturn on April 2, 2026, driven by renewed geopolitical concerns following signals of potential military escalation against Iran. This uncertainty has dampened recent optimism.
notableMoves: Oil prices surged: Brent crude rose 6.6% to nearly $108/barrel.
Precious metals declined: Gold fell 2% to $4,718.70, Silver dropped 4.9%.
Asian markets saw broad declines: South Korea's KOSPI dropped 5.2%, Japan's Nikkei 225 fell 2.6%, and Hong Kong's Hang Seng declined 1.4%.

exhibitions: Matisse's Jazz: Rhythms in Color (Art Institute of Chicago, through June 1)
More is More is More: A Melody of Maximalism (Art Center Waco, through Apr 25)
Gabriel Orozco Garden: The Three Friends of Winter (Leeum Museum of Art, Seoul)
